tasks.subject: Task 0: Backend prep — settings, env, deps
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Install phonenumbers + django-ratelimit, wire LEAD_TOKEN_SECRET and SHARE_LINKS_ENABLED env vars, add DRF pagination defaults. **Files:** Buzzmart_backend/requirements.txt, buzzmart/settings.py, .env.example. **Verify:** python manage.py check

```json:metadata
{"files":["Buzzmart_backend/requirements.txt","Buzzmart_backend/buzzmart/settings.py","Buzzmart_backend/.env.example"],"verifyCommand":"python manage.py check","acceptanceCriteria":["phonenumbers + django-ratelimit installed","LEAD_TOKEN_SECRET env var with prod fail-loud + dev fallback","SHARE_LINKS_ENABLED env var","CACHES default to locmem","PageNumberPagination default size 20"],"requiresUserVerification":false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Data model + migrations with backfill
tasks.description:
**Goal:** ShareLink, Lead, ClickEvent, StoreSlugAlias models + migration that backfills aliases + share links for existing rows.

```json:metadata
{"files":["Buzzmart_backend/accounts/models.py","Buzzmart_backend/accounts/admin.py","Buzzmart_backend/accounts/migrations/0009_share_links_leads_clicks_aliases.py","Buzzmart_backend/accounts/tests/test_share_link_models.py"],"verifyCommand":"python manage.py test accounts.tests.test_share_link_models -v 2","acceptanceCriteria":["Four new models with unique/index constraints from spec","Migration backfills StoreSlugAlias + ShareLink for existing data","Admin registers all four","3 model tests pass"],"requiresUserVerification":false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Utility modules — lead tokens, slug validation, phone
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Three well-tested utility modules used across API layer.

```json:metadata
{"files":["Buzzmart_backend/accounts/lead_tokens.py","Buzzmart_backend/accounts/slug_validation.py","Buzzmart_backend/accounts/phone.py","Buzzmart_backend/accounts/tests/test_lead_tokens.py","Buzzmart_backend/accounts/tests/test_slug_validation.py","Buzzmart_backend/accounts/tests/test_phone.py"],"verifyCommand":"python manage.py test accounts.tests.test_lead_tokens accounts.tests.test_slug_validation accounts.tests.test_phone -v 2","acceptanceCriteria":["HMAC sign/verify with tamper + expiry detection","Slug validate + 3-suggestion generator","E.164 normalize with NG default + invalid raises","13 tests pass"],"requiresUserVerification":false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Auto-create ShareLink on Product / BusinessDetails save
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Django signal handlers ensuring every Product and every BusinessDetails has a corresponding ShareLink at all times.

```json:metadata
{"files":["Buzzmart_backend/accounts/signals.py","Buzzmart_backend/accounts/apps.py","Buzzmart_backend/accounts/tests/test_share_link_models.py"],"verifyCommand":"python manage.py test accounts.tests.test_share_link_models -v 2","acceptanceCriteria":["post_save signal on Products creates ShareLink(kind=product)","post_save signal on BusinessDetails creates ShareLink(kind=store) + StoreSlugAlias(is_current=true)","get_or_create prevents duplicates on re-save","3 new signal tests pass"],"requiresUserVerification":false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: GET /api/share-links/<short_id>/resolve/
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Public endpoint returning merchant + product info for a short_id.

```json:metadata
{"files":["Buzzmart_backend/accounts/views.py","Buzzmart_backend/accounts/serializers.py","Buzzmart_backend/accounts/urls_share_links.py","Buzzmart_backend/buzzmart/urls.py","Buzzmart_backend/accounts/tests/test_share_link_api.py"],"verifyCommand":"python manage.py test accounts.tests.test_share_link_api.ShareLinkResolveTests -v 2","acceptanceCriteria":["200 with {kind, merchant, product?} for product link","200 with product=null for store link","404 for unknown OR inactive","AllowAny perm","4 tests pass"],"requiresUserVerification":false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: POST /api/share-links/<short_id>/identify/
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Public endpoint capturing visitor WhatsApp number, creating/updating Lead + ClickEvent, returning signed lead_token + redirect.

```json:metadata
{"files":["Buzzmart_backend/accounts/views.py","Buzzmart_backend/accounts/urls_share_links.py","Buzzmart_backend/accounts/tests/test_share_link_api.py"],"verifyCommand":"python manage.py test accounts.tests.test_share_link_api.ShareLinkIdentifyTests -v 2","acceptanceCriteria":["No-cookie identify creates Lead + ClickEvent(submit)","Valid cookie matches merchant -> ClickEvent(view), no new Lead","Cross-merchant cookie -> new Lead for current merchant","Invalid wa_number -> 400","Inactive link -> 404","6 tests pass"],"requiresUserVerification":false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Slug-alias resolution on public /store/<slug>/
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Retired slugs 301-redirect to current; unknowns 404; current still 200.

```json:metadata
{"files":["Buzzmart_backend/accounts/views.py","Buzzmart_backend/products/views.py","Buzzmart_backend/accounts/tests/test_store_alias_routing.py"],"verifyCommand":"python manage.py test accounts.tests.test_store_alias_routing -v 2","acceptanceCriteria":["Current slug -> 200","Retired slug -> 301 to current","Unknown -> 404","UUID path preserved through redirect","4 tests pass"],"requiresUserVerification":false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Merchant slug endpoints — PATCH + availability check
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Atomic slug update with alias retirement + debounced availability check.

```json:metadata
{"files":["Buzzmart_backend/accounts/views.py","Buzzmart_backend/accounts/urls.py","Buzzmart_backend/accounts/tests/test_slug_api.py"],"verifyCommand":"python manage.py test accounts.tests.test_slug_api -v 2","acceptanceCriteria":["PATCH atomic: retire old + create new + update store_slug","400 on taken (incl retired), reserved, invalid format","GET /check/ returns {available, reason?, suggestions?}","Suggestions only when reason=taken","8 tests pass"],"requiresUserVerification":false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Merchant leads endpoints — list + activity
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Paginated leads + per-lead activity drawer endpoint.

```json:metadata
{"files":["Buzzmart_backend/accounts/views.py","Buzzmart_backend/accounts/serializers.py","Buzzmart_backend/accounts/urls_share_links.py","Buzzmart_backend/accounts/tests/test_leads_api.py"],"verifyCommand":"python manage.py test accounts.tests.test_leads_api -v 2","acceptanceCriteria":["GET /leads/ paginated 20, includes whatsapp_link + click_count + order_count","?since= and ?search= filters work","Cross-merchant isolated","GET /leads/<id>/activity/ returns newest-first events; 404 on other merchant","7 tests pass"],"requiresUserVerification":false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Merchant share-stats endpoints (product + store)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Analytics rollup endpoints for product detail + manage store-link tab.

```json:metadata
{"files":["Buzzmart_backend/products/views.py","Buzzmart_backend/products/urls.py","Buzzmart_backend/accounts/views.py","Buzzmart_backend/accounts/serializers.py","Buzzmart_backend/accounts/urls_share_links.py","Buzzmart_backend/accounts/tests/test_share_link_api.py"],"verifyCommand":"python manage.py test accounts.tests.test_share_link_api.ShareStatsTests -v 2","acceptanceCriteria":["GET /api/products/<id>/share-stats/ returns short_id, full_url, counts, recent_clicks[:20]","Cross-merchant 403/404","GET /api/share-links/store-link/ same shape","3 tests pass"],"requiresUserVerification":false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: Setup serializer accepts slug + store/link aliases
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Merchants pick custom slug at setup; GET /store/link/ includes alias history.

```json:metadata
{"files":["Buzzmart_backend/accounts/serializers.py","Buzzmart_backend/accounts/views.py","Buzzmart_backend/accounts/tests/test_slug_api.py"],"verifyCommand":"python manage.py test accounts.tests.test_slug_api -v 2","acceptanceCriteria":["Setup accepts optional store_slug, falls back to auto-slugify","Invalid slug at setup -> 400","store/link/ response includes aliases array","3 new tests pass"],"requiresUserVerification":false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 11: Rate limiting on /resolve/ and /identify/
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 60/min/IP on /resolve/, 10/min/IP + 5/min/(IP,short_id) on /identify/.

```json:metadata
{"files":["Buzzmart_backend/accounts/views.py","Buzzmart_backend/accounts/tests/test_share_link_api.py"],"verifyCommand":"python manage.py test accounts -v 2","acceptanceCriteria":["61st /resolve/ from same IP -> 429","11th /identify/ from same IP -> 429","django-ratelimit with locmem cache","All backend tests pass"],"requiresUserVerification":false}
```

tasks.description:
